title: State of X402 – Independent Audit – Every Faciliator, Every Chain
abstract: State of X402 is an independent audit tool designed to provide comprehensive, unbiased assessments ensuring the integrity and reliability of systems. Ever ensures your systems meet the highest standards through rigorous evaluation processes.
abstract_zh: 听说有个叫 State of X402 的工具，就像是给系统做了一次全方位、不带偏见的体检，保证它运行得像新的一样！而且这个“医生”可是通过严格的评估过程来进行检查的。就是说，有了它，你就能确保自己家里的电脑、手机啥的，都是最新的标准水平。就像找一个靠谱的大师给你家里做一次大扫除，让你彻底放心一样！
